Bus Timings

Bus 91 Timings Ghubaiba Bus Station to Jebel Ali Bus Station

July 12, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Alright, check this out - Bus 91 is a total game-changer. It zips from Ghubaiba Bus Station all the way to Jebel Ali Bus Station, hitting up a bunch of key spots along the way. It’s a lifesaver for folks working in the Jebel Ali Free Zone, running often enough that you’re not left twiddling your thumbs.

The best part? It’s easy on the wallet and super convenient, making it a no-brainer for anyone trying to get between central Dubai and Jebel Ali without the usual headaches. Whether you’re a daily commuter or just visiting, this bus is your ticket to cruising across the city without breaking a sweat (or the bank).

Route Name 91
Route Description Ghubaiba Bus Station · 19 - Jebel Ali Bus Station · 4
Total Distance Approximately 50-55 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 1 hour 33 minutes
Operational Hours 05:20 to 22:00 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 7-12
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 91

Bus 91 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus 91 operates frequently throughout the day, ensuring convenient options for passengers traveling between Ghubaiba and Jebel Ali. Below are the bus timings:

From Ghubaiba Bus Station From Jebel Ali Bus Station
05:20 05:34
05:40 05:55
06:00 06:15
06:20 06:30

22:00  

Bus 91 Timetable

You can view the complete bus schedule on the RTA’s official site or use this link for Bus 91 Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus 91 is in line with the standard pricing for Dubai’s public transport system. The fare is calculated based on the number of zones traveled, with the typical fare for a journey on Bus 91 ranging from AED 7-12, depending on the distance. Passengers can use their Nol card to pay for their journey, making it a convenient and cashless payment option. Discounted fares are available for students, senior citizens, and people of determination (people with disabilities).

Bus Booking

While there is no need for advanced booking to use Bus 91, passengers can check real-time updates, plan routes, and manage their journeys using the RTA Dubai app. The app provides a user-friendly interface that allows passengers to track bus schedules, plan routes, and even estimate travel times. For those who prefer a more personalized experience, the Careem app offers an alternative option for direct rides to or from the bus stops, especially during peak hours or when carrying heavy luggage.

Bus Route

Bus 91 operates between two major points: Ghubaiba Bus Station · 19 and Jebel Ali Bus Station · 4. Below is the complete list of stops:

  1. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 19

  2. Raffa

  3. Rolla

  4. Sharaf DG Metro · 1

  5. Four Point Sheraton Hotel

  6. Dubai Municipality Center

  7. Business Bay Metro Seaside

  8. Dubai Natural Gas Co Limited

  9. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Main Gate

  10. Dubai Ports Authority, Free Zone Office

  11. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Roundabout 5

  12. Sony

  13. Roundabout 6

  14. Lease Office, 5

  15. Nafco

  16. Container Glass Factory

  1. Zaher Group

  2. Cleveland Bridge Engineering

  3. Cleveland Bridge Engineering, 2

  4. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Roundabout 8

  5. Kanoo Group

  6. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Roundabout 12

  7. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Roundabout 12

  8. Kanoo Group

  9. Dubai Ports Authority, Staff Quarters

  10. Gulf Denims Limited

  11. Jebel Ali Bus Station · 4

Bus 91 Station Overview

Ghubaiba Bus Station · 19

Ghubaiba Bus Station is one of Dubai’s most prominent transit hubs, located in the historic Bur Dubai area. As a key stop for Bus 91, this station connects passengers to various parts of the city and beyond.

Business Bay Metro Station Seaside Bus Stop Intersection

Business Bay Metro Station Seaside Bus Stop is a crucial intersection where Bus Routes 7, 9, 14, 91, and F20 converge. This stop serves as a vital connection point for passengers traveling within the Business Bay area and to various destinations across Dubai. Its strategic location near major business and residential areas makes it a convenient choice for daily commuters and travelers seeking easy access to key parts of the city.

Jebel Ali Bus Station · 4

Jebel Ali Bus Station is situated in the industrial and residential area of Jebel Ali, serving as an important stop on Bus 91’s route. This station provides easy access to the Jebel Ali Free Zone, Port, and surrounding residential communities. It features essential amenities to accommodate the needs of daily commuters and travelers working or living in the area. The station’s strategic location makes it a vital transit point for those traveling to and from Dubai’s southern regions.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus 91 traverses a mix of business and residential areas, with several key locations that might be of interest to tourists:

  1. Business Bay Metro Seaside: While not a tourist attraction itself, the Business Bay area is known for its modern architecture and vibrant business environment, which might appeal to visitors interested in Dubai’s urban development.

  2. Dubai Municipality Center: Located in the heart of Dubai, this area offers a glimpse into the city’s administrative and architectural landscape. It’s close to other central attractions.

  3. Four Points Sheraton Hotel: Situated near the bus route, this hotel offers accommodation with a view of Dubai’s skyline and is conveniently located for exploring nearby attractions.

  4. Jebel Ali Free Zone: Although primarily a business hub, the free zone area showcases Dubai’s industrial and economic growth, which might be of interest to those exploring Dubai’s economic sectors.

5.

The bus route primarily serves business and industrial zones rather than traditional tourist attractions.

Journey Experience

Embarking on Bus Route 91 from Ghubaiba Bus Station to Jebel Ali Bus Station takes you on an extensive journey through some of Dubai’s most intriguing neighborhoods and attractions.

As you approach Jebel Ali, you’ll notice the contrast of industrial zones and residential areas, reflecting Dubai’s rapid development and diverse economy.

This journey not only offers a convenient means of transportation but also a unique perspective on Dubai’s growth, innovation, and cultural diversity.

Travelling with Careem

The app provides a convenient way to book your ride, with prices ranging from AED 142 to AED 173, depending on factors like traffic and time of day. This makes it simple to reach the furthest point on the route comfortably and efficiently.

In conclusion, Bus 91 is an essential service for anyone traveling between Ghubaiba and Jebel Ali, providing a reliable and cost-effective mode of transportation. Whether you are commuting for work or exploring the city, this bus route offers convenience, connectivity, and flexibility to meet your travel needs. With frequent departures and key stops along the way, it ensures a smooth and hassle-free journey for all passengers.

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
